name: Alert Translator
desc: Normalizes a raw SIEM alert using an operator-defined configuration object. It extracts the normalized alert fields, assigns incremental alert IDs, preserves payload context, and produces a normalized alert collection.

outputConfig.variables: num_alerts, alerts.id, alerts.name, alerts.description, alerts.ttps, alerts.alert_type, alerts.acceptable_risk, alerts.payload_context

name: Engage Mapper
desc: Maps the normalized alert collection to MITRE Engage. It uses alert_type to select the Goal, TTPs to identify candidate Activities, and acceptable_risk to label each Activity as recommended or not_recommended according to CVSS-derived exposure scores.

outputConfig.variables: input_alert_id, input_alert_name, goal_id, goal_name, acceptable_risk, approaches, activities, activity_exposure, recommendation.status
